lead.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗RCT、肩袖肌腱病系统综述，以及卒中康复成本效益分析
lead.titleEn: Physio-led FAI RCT, Rotator Cuff Tendinopathy SR, and Stroke Rehab Cost-Effectiveness
lead.paragraphZh: 今天共有20个条目，涵盖7个专科方向。3个最高分条目（85分）都是重要的临床证据：骨科与肌骨领域的PhysioFIRST研究是评估者设盲RCT，同时该方向还有一篇肩袖肌腱病的系统综述值得关注。神经康复的观察研究则从成本效益角度探讨了急性卒中后康复机构的选择。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's 20 entries span 7 specialties. Three top-scored items (85 points) present crucial clinical evidence: the PhysioFIRST study, an assessor-blinded RCT in orthopedics and musculoskeletal, and a systematic review on rotator cuff tendinopathy are notable. For neurorehabilitation, an observational study analyzes the cost-effectiveness of post-acute stroke rehab facilities.

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that a targeted strengthening program (STRENGTH) led by physiotherapists was superior to a standardized stretching program (STRETCH) for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) regarding hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived global change at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估了物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）治疗的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）组在 6 个月时，其髋部相关生活质量（QOL）和患者感知变化总评分（GROC）均优于标准化牵伸（STRETCH）组。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在 FAI 治疗中优先采用强化训练方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗效果：一项评估者设盲、有限披露的随机对照试验（PhysioFIRST 研究）
items.titleEn: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，物理治疗师主导的目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）方案，在 6 个月时，相比标准化牵伸（STRETCH）方案，在股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的髋部相关生活质量和患者感知变化方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluating physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) found that the targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) group showed superior hip-related quality of life (QOL) and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change (GROC) at 6 months compared to the standardized stretching (STRETCH) group. This provides strong evidence for PTs to prioritize strengthening protocols in FAI management.
items.limitation: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.
items.limitationEn: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis identified the most effective physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, suggesting a combination of manual therapy, exercise, and education as optimal.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）旨在比较不同物理治疗干预措施对成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）的疗效。结果确定了最有效的干预措施组合（例如，结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育），为 PT 提供了优化肩袖肌腱病治疗方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较有效性：系统综述与网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）确定了成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）最有效的物理治疗干预组合，建议结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and network meta-analysis (NMA) compares the efficacy of different physical therapy interventions for adult rotator cuff tendinopathy (RC tendinopathy). It identifies the most effective combination of interventions (e.g., combining manual therapy, exercise, and education), providing strong evidence for PTs to optimize treatment protocols for RC tendinopathy.
items.limitation: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (BONEMORE) investigated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women. Both interventions showed effects on physical function.
items.curatedReason: OsteoStrong和动态多组分运动对老年女性的身体功能均有积极影响。但如果原文有明确数据，要看干预的实际效应量，以决定是否值得作为首选推荐。在老年女性骨质疏松干预中，你需要关注这些新型手段的长期疗效和具体适用人群。
items.titleZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验：OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能影响的比较
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验探讨了 OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能的影响，结果显示两种干预措施均对身体功能有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: OsteoStrong and dynamic multicomponent exercise both positively influence physical function in older women. However, if the original text provides specific data, you need to assess the actual effect sizes of these interventions to determine if they warrant first-line recommendation. For osteoporosis interventions in older women, you should focus on the long-term efficacy and specific populations for whom these novel methods are applicable.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和外推性有待结合具体效应量进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: The clinical significance and generalizability of the findings require further evaluation in conjunction with specific effect sizes.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective study on US Army trainees found that biomarkers of systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis were associated with musculoskeletal injuries (MSKI) and persisted throughout training.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究评估了美国陆军新兵在基础战斗训练（BCT）期间，全身炎症和氧化应激生物标志物是否与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并追踪了这些标志物的纵向变化。结果表明，系统性炎症和氧化应激可能在损伤发生前就已存在并持续存在。这提示 PT 在评估和管理陆军新兵 MSKI 时，可能需要考虑这些生理指标。
items.titleZh: 美国陆军新兵在肌肉骨骼损伤前后出现炎症和氧化还原稳态改变
items.titleEn: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summaryZh: 一项针对美国陆军新兵的前瞻性研究发现，系统性炎症和氧化还原稳态的生物标志物与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并在训练期间持续存在。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study assessed whether systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis biomarkers associate with musculoskeletal injury (MSKI) during US Army Basic Combat Training (BCT) and characterized longitudinal changes. Findings suggest systemic inflammation and oxidative stress may precede and persist following injury. This suggests PTs may need to consider these physiological markers when assessing and managing MSKI in Army trainees.
items.limitation: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.

items.title: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD thesis explored patient experiences, optimized rehabilitation interventions, and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR), comparing targeted strengthening to standard care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后患者的康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。它研究了患者如何体验康复，比较了强化训练与标准社区康复的效果，并分析了阿片类药物的持续使用。这为 PT 在 THR 翻修后患者的康复管理提供了有价值的见解。
items.titleZh: 翻修全髋关节置换术后的康复与结局：患者体验、优化康复干预与阿片类药物使用（PhD 学术奖）
items.titleEn: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summaryZh: 一项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后的患者康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research thesis investigated patient experiences and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR). It examined how patients experience rehabilitation, compared targeted strengthening to standard community rehabilitation, and analyzed persistent opioid use. This offers valuable insights for PTs managing patients post-revision THR.
items.limitation: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.
items.limitationEn: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRF) versus Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNF) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation from a U.S. healthcare payer perspective.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方视角看，卒中后急性期康复，入住IRF比SNF更具成本效益。这为IRF在政策和报销谈判中提供了强有力的经济学证据，你应该熟悉这些数据。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方视角评估急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构 vs. 专业护理机构
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医保支付方视角，评估了卒中后急性期康复中，住院康复机构（IRF）与专业护理机构（SNF）的成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a U.S. healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation in Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than in Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs). This provides strong economic evidence for IRFs in policy and reimbursement discussions, and you should be familiar with this data.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性及假设的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study uses a decision analytic model, and its results depend on the accuracy of model parameters and the validity of assumptions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the 'All of Us' research program examined sociodemographic determinants of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 这项针对“All of Us”研究项目中脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，旨在比较食物不安全（FI）的患病率、其社会人口学决定因素以及与身体质量指数（BMI）的关联。这为 PT 了解 SCI 患者的社会经济影响及其对健康结局的潜在作用提供了信息。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤个体食物不安全性的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联：来自“All of Us”研究项目的横断面分析
items.titleEn: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summaryZh: 一项针对脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，调查了食物不安全（FI）的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional analysis from the 'All of Us' research program, focusing on individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), aims to compare the prevalence of food insecurity (FI), identify its correlates, and examine its association with body mass index (BMI). This informs PTs about the socioeconomic impacts on SCI patients and their potential role in health outcomes.
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, finding lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的腓肠肌肌电活动。这提示在重返运动评估中，除了关注股四头肌和臏腱，还要重视三头肌，将其纳入康复训练目标。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电活动，发现ACL重建组的活动度较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals after ACLR demonstrated lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls. This suggests that in return-to-sport assessments, in addition to focusing on the quadriceps and patellar tendon, you should also prioritize the triceps surae and include it in rehabilitation training goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为对照研究，但未随机分组，且主要结局为肌电活动，非功能性表现。
items.limitationEn: This is a controlled study but not randomized, and the primary outcome was EMG activity, not functional performance.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning to help prevent sudden cardiac death.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划的横断面研究，是在 Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡后进行的。研究旨在预防足球运动员的猝死。对于在运动医学领域工作的 PT 来说，这项研究提供了关于特定地区（喀麦隆）预防措施的实践信息。
items.titleZh: 预防喀麦隆足球运动员猝死：Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡 22 年后的随访
items.titleEn: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summaryZh: 一项针对喀麦隆足球俱乐部的横断面调查，评估了心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划，旨在预防运动员猝死。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study investigating cardiovascular screening strategies and emergency response planning in Cameroonian football clubs, conducted after the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe, aims to prevent sudden cardiac death in athletes. For PTs working in sports medicine, this study provides practical information on preventative measures in a specific region (Cameroon).
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summary: This editorial calls for increased attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the field's growing recognition and the demands of high-performance competition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，鉴于电子竞技日益增长的地位（如进入奥运会）。它强调了运动医学、公共卫生和电竞利益相关者需要严肃对待电竞选手心理健康问题。对于 PT，尤其是有志于运动康复的，这是对新兴领域关注点的一个提醒。
items.titleZh: 是时候关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康了
items.titleEn: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，因为该领域日益受到认可，并且竞技要求严苛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial calls for attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the growing prominence of esports (e.g., inclusion in the Olympics). It emphasizes the need for sports medicine, public health, and esports stakeholders to take player mental health seriously. For PTs, especially those in sports rehabilitation, this serves as a reminder of emerging areas of concern.
items.limitation: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.

items.title: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summary: This article calls for action on period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence, impact on performance, and the need for tailored management pathways due to existing evidence gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章发出了对女性运动员经期疼痛问题的行动呼吁，强调了其普遍性（影响 60% 的女性运动员）及其对运动表现的负面影响。研究指出当前证据存在空白，呼吁制定针对性的管理方案。这对于关注女性健康和运动表现的 PT 具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员的经期疼痛：行动呼吁——是时候填补证据空白并制定针对性管理方案了
items.titleEn: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章呼吁关注女性运动员的经期疼痛问题，强调其普遍性、对运动表现的影响以及因证据不足而需要制定针对性管理方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article issues a call to action regarding period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence (affecting 60% of female athletes) and negative impact on sports performance. It points out evidence gaps and calls for tailored management pathways. This is significant for PTs focusing on women's health and sports performance.
items.limitation: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to maintain fitness amidst global conflicts, confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，以应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等挑战对体能的影响。它借鉴了 COVID-19 期间的经验，并考虑了地缘政治危机下的锻炼维持问题。虽然具有前瞻性，但对 PT 的直接临床指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：一个运动与体育医学框架，以在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露背景下维持体能
items.titleEn: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，旨在应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露对体能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to address the impact of modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure on fitness. It draws on experiences from the COVID-19 pandemic and considers fitness maintenance during geopolitical crises. While forward-looking, its direct clinical guidance for PTs is limited.
items.limitation: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.

items.title: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summary: This editorial introduces an open-source tool designed to help researchers in sports and exercise medicine verify and select appropriate academic journals for publication.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论介绍了支持期刊选择的一个开源学术期刊验证工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者在日益拥挤的出版环境中找到合适的期刊。对 PT 研究者来说，这可能有助于论文发表的决策，但与临床实践关系不大。
items.titleZh: 支持期刊选择：一个面向运动与体育医学研究者的开源学术期刊验证工具
items.titleEn: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论介绍了一个开源工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者验证和选择合适的学术期刊。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial introduces an open-source academic journal verification tool to support journal selection for researchers in sports and exercise medicine navigating a crowded publishing landscape. While potentially aiding PT researchers in publication decisions, it has limited relevance to clinical practice.
items.limitation: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey study described factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: BFRT在儿童和青少年ACL损伤患者中的临床应用仍缺乏一致性。如果你考虑在青少年患者中使用BFRT，应谨慎并与最新研究保持同步，避免过度依赖经验。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查研究描述了影响物理治疗师对前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical application of BFRT in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients still lacks consistency. If you are considering using BFRT in adolescent patients, proceed cautiously and stay updated with the latest research to avoid over-reliance on anecdotal experience.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, potentially subject to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summary: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a research priority, emphasizing the importance of muscle power (force x velocity) in childhood for long-term musculoskeletal health and function.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调肌肉力量（而非仅仅是力量）与功能的关系，并呼吁关注儿童期低肌肉力量这一可干预的风险因素。对于儿科 PT，这提示了关注儿童肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.titleZh: 播下力量的种子：儿科肌力不足作为生命历程研究重点
items.titleEn: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调儿童期肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a lifecourse research priority, highlighting the relationship between muscle power (not just strength) and function, and advocating for attention to low muscle power in childhood as a modifiable risk factor. For pediatric PTs, this emphasizes the importance of monitoring and addressing muscle power development in children.
items.limitation: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to inform healthy aging initiatives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的个体内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。研究结果为 PT 了解全球老年人群的健康状况提供了背景信息，并可能影响未来针对特定人群的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家/地区的证据
items.titleEn: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to promote healthy aging. The findings provide context for PTs regarding the health status of global older populations and may inform future intervention strategies tailored to specific demographics.
items.limitation: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of RCTs found that combined exercise training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响。结果显示，联合训练（结合有氧和抗阻训练）在降低 24 小时收缩压和舒张压方面最有效。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在高血压管理中推荐联合运动方案。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响：随机对照试验网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析发现，联合运动训练（有氧和抗阻）在高血压成人中对降低 24 小时动态血压最有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis of RCTs compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. The findings indicate that combined training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour systolic and diastolic blood pressure. This provides strong evidence for PTs to recommend combined exercise programs in hypertension management.
items.limitation: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.
items.limitationEn: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis of UK Biobank data suggests that light-intensity physical activity (LPA) is associated with a reduced risk of all-cause mortality, even at low levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析，探讨了轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险之间在不同中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平下的剂量-反应关系。结果提示，即使在低 MVPA 水平下，增加 LPA 也能带来显著的死亡率降低。这为 PT 强调低强度活动（如日常活动、散步）的健康益处提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 轻度体力活动与全因死亡风险之间的剂量-反应关系：因果推断分析
items.titleEn: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析表明，轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险降低相关，即使在中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平较低时也是如此。
items.curatedReasonEn: This causal inference analysis using UK Biobank data explores the dose-response relationship between light-intensity physical activity (LPA) and all-cause mortality risk across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA). It suggests that increasing LPA can significantly reduce mortality risk, even at lower MVPA levels. This provides strong evidence for PTs to emphasize the health benefits of low-intensity activities.
items.limitation: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: An RCT found that perioperative respiratory muscle training improved respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）评估了围手术期呼吸肌训练对接受心脏手术的老年患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。结果表明，这种训练可能改善患者的肺部恢复和整体预后。对于进行心肺康复的 PT 来说，这是一项重要的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.titleEn: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）发现，围手术期呼吸肌训练可改善老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly cardiac surgery patients. Findings suggest this training may improve pulmonary recovery and overall prognosis. This provides important clinical evidence for PTs involved in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: This single-blind RCT (N=28) compared the immediate effects of dynamic taping vs. sports taping on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）在改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面即时效果相似。这意味着你可以根据患者具体需求和对不同贴扎的耐受性，灵活选择贴扎方式。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项单盲随机对照试验（N=28）比较了动态贴扎与运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的即时影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) show similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability. This means you can flexibly choose the taping method based on the patient's specific needs and tolerance for different taping techniques.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（28人），仅评估了即时效应，长期效果和临床意义尚待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed immediate effects; long-term efficacy and clinical significance require further research.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy
